description: A group of cub scouts tells a scary story in rural Pennsylvania. Adam Cross, one of the leaders, hears a strange humming and investigates. The group witnesses unexplainable phenomena—floating objects and a battery launching itself—before discovering Cross dead, floating, and surging with electricity.

transcript.line: Thing is, no one exactly knows what happened to the crying man that summer. Some say that he drowned in the lake, but others say that they've seen his ghost, wandering these woods, in search for his lost sister.
Actually, they say if you're quiet and listen real hard... you can still hear him crying.
Mr. Cross, that was, like, the worst crying man ever.
Really? I thought it was pretty good.
You guys think we're kidding. Just remember to stick close to the campfire tonight, okay?
Hey, guys. Do you hear that?
That humming sound. Stay here. I'm gonna take a look around the campground.
He's just trying to scare us. So lame. No one really believes him. Come on, guys. Grab a s'more. Well, that's for you.
Now, I know... Tommy, I know you like chocolates. Here. Don't hog the marshmallows, okay?
Mr. Cross? Mr. Cross! Come on, guys. Let's go look for him.
Stay close.Mr. Cross, are you okay?
Mr. Cross! We should just go back.
